name: github
tagline: ClawHub (652★): Interact with GitHub using the `gh` CLI. Use `gh issue`, `gh pr`, `gh run`, and `gh api` for issues, PRs, CI runs, and adva
verdict: No scope boundaries despite covering all of general GitHub interaction, so it's prone to firing on unrelated tasks. It also has zero failure handling — if gh is missing, unauthenticated, or a call fails, nothing in the skill says what to do — and no version tracking at all.

highlights.summary: No mention anywhere of what to do if `gh` is missing, unauthenticated, or a command/API call fails — total silence across a multi-step external-tool-dependent flow.
No 'NOT for' / out-of-scope / pointer-to-other-skill language anywhere in the description or body; the skill's scope is broad enough (general GitHub interaction) that exclusions wo
No version field in frontmatter, no changelog section, and no dated revision notes anywhere in the file.
